source_metadata.title: 2025/10/16 - JU [Part 1]
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 16 October 2025 | Justice Committee

Report of the Ombudsman, OPCAT Report: Report on an examination of the Prisoners of Extreme Risk Unit under the Crimes of Torture Act 1989

Department of Corrections
- Leigh Marsh, Commissioner Custodial Services                
- Jeanette Burns, Director Extreme Risk Directorate            
- Juanita Ryan, DCE Pae Ora                                             
- Emma Gardner, Chief Mental Health & Addictions Officer
